employer.information: One of the world's largest semiconductor foundries, with its Singapore campus in Woodlands housing two advanced wafer fabrication plants (Fab 7 and Fab 3E). The Singapore operations employ over 4,000 workers producing chips for automotive, IoT, 5G, and data center applications. GlobalFoundries Singapore is a key pillar of the country's semiconductor ecosystem and regularly recruits international technicians to support 24/7 production operations.
